dataset.title: GBIF Occurrence Download 0010031-260519110011954
dataset.abstract: A dataset containing all occurrences available in GBIF matching the query: { "and" : [ "BasisOfRecord is one of (Human Observation, Specimen, Machine Observation)", "Continent is one of (South America, North America)", "CoordinateUncertaintyInMeters 0.0-1000.0", "Geometry POLYGON((-162.34758 25.9115,-103.01096 -61.1241,-27.50376 -59.84326,-30.19117 26.01082,-90.19833 26.51363,-119.39361 32.63775,-162.34758 25.9115))", "HasCoordinate is true", "OccurrenceStatus is Present", "TaxonKey is Coleoptera", "Year 2000-2026" ] } The dataset includes records from the following constituent datasets. The full metadata for each constituent is also included in this archive: 66 records from Estonian Museum of Natural History Department of Zoology 1113 records from Samanta Orellana Research Collection 657 records from Observation.org, Nature data from around the World 61 records from Coleoptera World (Luomus) (CW) 17132 records from Snow Entomological Museum Collection 1 records from Biodiversity of intertidal invertebrates of Taraba Sound (Magellan Region, Chile) 1181 records from Proyecto para compatibilizar el inventario de biota edáfica BGBD con el Sistema Nacional de Información sobre Biodiversidad 1381 records from NEON Biorepository Benthic Macroinvertebrate Collection (Taxonomy Subsample) 79 records from Registros de macroinvertebrados acuáticos en un bosque seco del municipio de Honda 21 records from Occurrences of aquatic invertebrates in the Antarctic and Subantarctic regions 6209 records from Études entomologiques pilotées par la Société entomologique Antilles-Guyane-Étude des insectes de la canopée (SEAG - Montagne des Chevaux) 112 records from CardObs : Observations naturalistes issues de l'outil CardObs-Inventaire entomologique à la Forêt Inondée de Jarry, Guadeloupe 25 records from Museum of Comparative Zoology, Harvard University 1048 records from Étude entomologique de la réserve biologique du Nord de la Grande Terre-Inventaire entomologique 2020-2022 de la réserve biologique dirigée du Nord Grande Terre, Guadeloupe (ONF) 211288 records from iNaturalist Research-grade Observations 327 records from NEON Biorepository Carabid Collection (DNA Extracts) 420 records from NABU|naturgucker 121 records from Illinois Natural History Survey Insect Collection 13 records from Registros de macroinvertebrados acuáticos tomados en el tramo medio del río Otún 17 records from Registros de macroinvertebrados acuáticos en ríos alto andinos de la cuenca media del río Chicamocha 1664 records from Metacomunidad de animales de charcos temporales de Rocha, Uruguay 1 records from Cornell University Insect Collection (CUIC) 1502 records from CardObs : Observations naturalistes issues de l'outil CardObs-Observations naturalistes de Philippe RAVAT.
